creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2006-11-08 23:07:29 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net/quagga           Makefile 
  Added files:
    net/quagga/files     patch-ospfd-ospf_packet.c 
  Log:
  From Changelog:
  
  2006-08-28 Andy Gay
  
          * ospf_packet.c: (ospf_make_db_desc) Assert added with More-bit
          fixes does not hold up with addition of Ogier DB-Exchange
          optimisation, which can empty the db-summary list in between
          sent DD packets. Remove assert, update More-bit always when
          in Exchange.
  
  PR:             ports/105279
  Submitted by:   Boris Kovalenko <boris@tagnet.ru> (maintainer)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.45      +1 -0      ports/net/quagga/Makefile
  1.1       +51 -0     ports/net/quagga/files/patch-ospfd-ospf_packet.c (new)
